data.heading: Why dog owners across the UK keep coming back to this one
paragraphs: Made in the UK to GMP standards, in Lincoln. Not a mystery powder from an unnamed factory abroad.
20,000+ dogs helped in the last 12 months, and backed by 4,537+ verified reviews from owners who'd tried everything else first.
A 90-day money-back guarantee, so the risk sits with us, not you. And 51% of our profits go to UK animal welfare charities including the RSPCA, Dogs Trust and Guide Dogs.
We're not here to scare you into buying. We'd rather show you the label.

data.headline: You've cleaned the ears again. By next week, they're gunky again.
data.intro: If you're reading this, you already know the cycle. And you're tired of it.

painPoints.title: The 2am licking that neither of you sleeps through
painPoints.body: Paws licked and chewed, sometimes raw, sometimes stained. You lie there listening to it, feeling helpless, wishing you could just make it stop.

painPoints.title: Ears that come back gunky no matter what you do
painPoints.body: Smelly, waxy, itchy ears. You clean them, you use the drops, and a few days later you're right back where you started.

painPoints.title: Itchy, flaky skin and a dog that can't settle
painPoints.body: Constant scratching. A dog that seems uncomfortable in its own skin, when all you want is for it to be happy and calm.

painPoints.title: Money out, brief relief, back to square one
painPoints.body: Steroids, ear drops, ear cleaning, special diets, supplement after supplement. The vet bills add up fast, and still nothing seems to last.

data.heading: Here's what most owners are never told
paragraphs: A lot of itching, paw licking and gunky ears starts in the gut, because the gut and skin are linked. Owners spend months treating the symptom on the outside, the itch, the ear, the stool, while the root sits untouched on the inside.

5 Strain Probiotic+ floods the gut with five research-backed strains of good bacteria, feeds them with chicory-root prebiotic, and adds a digestive enzyme complex to help break food down. Calm the inside, and the outside has the best chance to follow.
Keep reading. We'll show you exactly how it works, and the dogs, just like yours, it's already helped.

data.heading: Five honest reasons owners choose 5 Strain Probiotic+
paragraphs: 1. It works at the root, not the surface. Five research-backed strains, a chicory-root prebiotic to feed them, and digestive enzymes, all in one cold-filled capsule.
2. It suits almost any dog. Suitable for daily, long-term use across breeds and sizes, from 12 weeks of age. (Not for puppies under 12 weeks or pregnant and lactating dogs.)
3. It's gentle, with nothing to upset sensitive dogs. No unhealthy fillers or grains, just the active ingredients, in a cold-filled capsule that's heat and moisture free.
4. It couldn't be easier to give. It's a sprinkle capsule, twist it open and mix the contents into food. No pills to force.
5. The risk is on us. A 90-day money-back guarantee means if it's not for your dog, you get your money back.

data.quote: I started these on the 24th January 2025 and today I actually saw a difference, no more paw licking or chewing. I cleaned her ears out today and nothing in there either. A much more relaxed and happy dog, thank you.

data.headline: It treats the cause, not just the symptom
data.subheadline: Two simple ideas explain why this works when other things haven't.

steps.title: It usually starts in the gut
steps.body: The gut and skin are linked, the gut-skin connection. When the gut microbiome is out of balance, the knock-on effects show up on the outside: itchy skin, paw licking, gunky ears, scooting, a dull coat and loose stools. Rebalance the gut and you give the whole system a chance to settle.

steps.title: Five strains, fed and ready to work
steps.body: Five research-backed strains, Lactobacillus acidophilus, rhamnosus, brevis, plantarum and Bifidobacterium lactis, crowd out unfriendly bacteria and support the gut lining. Chicory-root prebiotic (inulin) feeds them so they establish and stay effective.

steps.title: Alive when your dog gets them
steps.body: Probiotics are live organisms, and heat kills them while moisture exhausts them early. Most dog probiotic chews are baked and sit in a moist tub. Ours is cold-filled in a sealed capsule, heat and moisture free, so the live cultures actually reach the gut, the way chews can't.

data.heading: If your dog is sensitive, allergic or easily upset, this was made for you
paragraphs: There's nothing in here to bulk it out or trip up a delicate tummy. No unhealthy fillers. No grains. Just five research-backed probiotic strains, a chicory-root prebiotic to feed them, and a digestive enzyme complex to help break food down.
Every ingredient is human-grade, and the full list is printed on the pack, so you can check it against anything your dog reacts to.
It's cold-filled to protect the live cultures, made in the UK to GMP standards, and co-developed with a practising UK vet. A gentle daily formula you can feel confident giving, long-term.

data.quote: Our pug Rolo suffers from multiple allergies, both food and environmental, and we'd tried everything to ease his itching. I was sceptical that a probiotic could help, but after a few weeks his skin isn't itchy anymore, his coat looks amazing and he's far more comfortable overall. We've even been able to reduce his medication to just occasional flare ups.

image.role: Photo of a pug whose owner left this allergy review, upload from the live review widget

data.heading: No pills to force. No fight at dinner time.
paragraphs: This is the part owners are most relieved about. You never have to make your dog swallow anything.
It's a sprinkle capsule. Twist it open and mix the contents straight into their food, once a day by weight. That's it.
No complicated routine, no wrestling a tablet into a clamped mouth. Just sprinkle and go. Even fussy dogs take it happily over food.

data.heading: Try it with the risk on us, not you
paragraphs: We know you've been let down before. You've spent money on things that promised the world and changed nothing. So we're not going to ask you to take our word for it.
Every order comes with a 90-day money-back guarantee. The microbiome takes time to rebalance, so the 90 days gives the product a fair run, and gives you a no-questions-asked safety net.
If it's not right for your dog, you get your money back. Simple as that.

data.quote: Daily probiotics and enzymes make a meaningful difference to a dog's digestion.
data.attribution: Dr Kishan Vara MRCVS, practising UK vet and co-developer of 5 Strain Probiotic+

data.quote: My dog was on the baked chews but saw the advert saying non-baked chews are better. She was still having itchy ears on the baked chews. Two and a half weeks on these and the difference is already massive. Since I adopted her in 2018 I've spent so much on steroids, ear drops and ear cleaning at the vet. data.heading: Exactly what's inside, in plain English
paragraphs: Five research-backed probiotic strains at 5 billion live cultures (CFU) per serving: Lactobacillus acidophilus, Lactobacillus rhamnosus, Lactobacillus brevis, Lactobacillus plantarum and Bifidobacterium lactis.
Chicory-root prebiotic (inulin) to feed the beneficial bacteria so they establish and stay effective, plus a digestive enzyme complex to help break food down.

All human-grade, with no unhealthy fillers or grains. Cold-filled, heat and moisture free, to protect the live cultures that chews can degrade. Made in the UK to GMP standards. We'd rather show you the label than make you trust a slogan.

data.quote: My bulldog, for two and a half years every summer, licked her paws bald and raw. The vet stuff was £140 for two weeks and nothing worked. This is £33 including delivery and lasts about two months. Took a week to start working but she's not licked for three weeks now. I don't work for these guys, I just wanted to tell people.

My Staffy was eating cat poo at about 8 months old, his energy was killed off and his breath turned to an ammonia smell. We got these tablets to help him, and he went from that and chewing and licking his paw to being a healthy, happy, energetic dog. He's still on them and enjoys eating them. For anyone on the fence, no need to be skeptical. Thank you from myself, my wife and most importantly Mr Zuchi.

items.q: Will it actually work for my dog?
items.a: No honest brand can promise a result for every dog, which is exactly why there's a 90-day money-back guarantee. What we can show you is dogs just like yours, 20,000+ helped in the last 12 months and 4,537+ verified reviews across breeds, ages and exact symptoms.

items.q: How do I give it, and how much?
items.a: It's a sprinkle capsule. Twist it open and mix the contents into food, once daily by weight: up to 25kg, 1 capsule a day; 25-40kg, 2 a day; 40kg+, 3 a day. Start with half the daily amount for 5-7 days, then move to the full dose. It's not meant to be given whole.

items.q: How long until I see results?
items.a: It varies by dog. Some owners notice changes in the first week or two, often firmer stools first. Skin and coat changes usually build over about 8 to 12 weeks as the microbiome rebalances. The 90-day guarantee covers the wait.
Then you get your money back. The 90-day money-back guarantee puts the risk on us, not you. Just get in touch with our UK team.

items.q: Did a vet have a hand in this?
items.a: Yes. It was co-developed with practising UK vet Dr Kishan Vara MRCVS. It's a daily supplement, not a prescription, and works alongside your vet's advice.

items.q: Is it suitable for all ages and sizes?
items.a: It's suitable for daily, long-term use across breeds and sizes from 12 weeks of age, and seniors often benefit most. It isn't for puppies under 12 weeks, or pregnant and lactating dogs. If your dog is on medication, immunocompromised or on antibiotics, check with your vet first.

items.q: Is it chicken flavoured? My dog has a chicken allergy.
items.a: It has a natural chicken flavouring, which is what makes it easy to sprinkle over food and gets even fussy dogs eating it. It's free from grains and unhealthy fillers. If your dog has a diagnosed chicken allergy or another known sensitivity, get in touch before starting and we'll help you decide.
We ship across the UK quickly. Choose a subscription and it arrives automatically each cycle with free shipping, and you can pause or cancel anytime.
51% of our profits go to UK animal welfare charities including the RSPCA, Dogs Trust and Guide Dogs. When you help your dog, you help a dog in need.

data.heading: Why we do this at all
paragraphs: The pet supplement industry is broken: profit-first formulas, heat-processed ingredients and bacteria that die before they reach your dog's gut. Nobody was fixing it, so we did.

That's why 51% of every penny of profit goes to UK animal welfare charities including the RSPCA, Dogs Trust and Guide Dogs. So when you help your dog, you help dogs who have no one. That's the whole point.
We're for the dog owners who are done settling for an industry that puts profit before the animal.
